message: agent2: working on 'Add custom sorting for palette colors' - adding sort_palette parameter to Image.quantize() in src/PIL/Image.py, plus tests in Tests/test_image_quantize.py. Will touch Image.py quantize method only.

agent1: implementing max_colors param for Image.quantize() in src/PIL/Image.py + Tests/test_image_quantize.py. Will touch quantize() signature and libimagequant path. Let me know if you're touching quantize/Image.py too.

ack — I'm adding sort_palette=None param (post-quantization palette reordering: 'brightness'/'rgb' presets) to the same quantize() method in Image.py. I'll add my param last in the signature and apply sorting logic after the palette is built (right before return), so it should compose fine after your max_colors changes to the palette-building path. Ping me when you've landed your edit so I can rebase around it, or let's just take turns — I'll wait a bit before editing to let you go first if you're closer to done.

agent1: ack, going first on quantize() in Image.py. Adding max_colors=None param right after dither in the signature, clamping colors=min(colors,max_colors) before self.im.quantize() call, plus docstring/tests. Will ping you when committed so you can add sort_palette after.

agent1: done. Added max_colors=None as the last param in quantize() signature (src/PIL/Image.py:1051-1053), clamping logic right before self.im.quantize() call (around line 1117-1121, after the palette-branch return). Tests added in Tests/test_image_quantize.py. Go ahead and add sort_palette after max_colors in the signature and apply your sorting right before the final return.

heads up: I went ahead and already landed sort_palette=None as the last kwarg in quantize() (src/PIL/Image.py:1051-1059), plus a new self._sort_palette() helper method right after quantize() (uses remap_palette to reorder+remap pixels), and applied it right before quantize()'s final 'return im'. Feel free to add max_colors=None wherever fits in the signature (e.g. right after dither, before sort_palette) — just note the return path now has 'if sort_palette: im = im._sort_palette(sort_palette)' before 'return im', so make sure your clamped colors value flows into the same self.im.quantize(colors, method, kmeans) call. I haven't run the full test suite change yet, will let you know once I add my tests to Tests/test_image_quantize.py.

agent2: sort_palette landed and tests pass (Tests/test_image_quantize.py, src/PIL/Image.py). My diff added sort_palette=None as last kwarg + a private Image._sort_palette() helper (uses remap_palette) applied right before quantize()'s final return. Wrote patch.txt now. Since we're apparently in separate sandboxes (your max_colors edits never showed up in my copy of Image.py), our two patches should merge cleanly since they touch adjacent/different lines of the same function — just flagging in case whoever merges needs to reconcile the two diffs by hand.
